prompt:
Creative composite photography, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, clean minimalistic white background, studio lighting, high detail, clear focus.

A real EVERYDAY OBJECT is physically placed and perfectly inscribed in a hand-drawn cartoon in black ink. The drawing is a simple, expressive linear graphic with minimal strokes, similar to a quick sketch on paper.

THE OBJECT represents A WELL-THOUGHT-OUT PART OF THE SCENE, skillfully completing a visual pun or concept. A cartoon character dynamically interacts with an object in a humorous, meaningful, or unexpected way.

Photorealistic object + bold black line drawing style, perfect combination of real object and illustration, pure negative space, artistic and witty concept, high-quality product photography combined with doodles.
